# C3BO Balance Patch

Hosting site for 5O OS battletested Beyond All Reason balance suggestions to improve gameplay based on real ingame cost-performance per unit category.

Feedback to: https://discord.com/channels/549281623154229250/1448671751662997536

-------

# Patch objectives:

All the recommended changes together should:
- Bring bot/veh power level a bit closer together.
- Encourage unit compositions at both t1 and t2.
- Help restore power level parity between t2 techtrees and factions.
- Encourage unused units to a reasonable cost/performance expected of the unit category.
- Ensure that units have a degree of weakness to something and a reasonable performance per category.
- Encourage the use of miscellaneous buildings that see no use and enrich the game variety of strategy.
---------
- - Additional compatibility option with TechCore patch, tweaks below. Please see TechCore setup instructions on my other github project. https://github.com/Cebolletoth/C3BOBAR/blob/main/TechCoreBAR.md
---------
------
# Welcome message C3BO PATCH
```
!welcome-message https://github.com/Cebolletoth/TechCore-Patch-BAR    Balance patch made by C3BO, see changes in link.

```

# Welcome message C3BOTECHCORE
```
!welcome-message Techcore instructions on discord link. Please leave some feedback after the game. https://discord.com/channels/549281623154229250/1447223310319489024/1467668620204310643         C3BO patch changelog on github https://github.com/Cebolletoth/TechCore-Patch-BAR

```
------

# Tweakunit codes

```
!bset tweakunits 


```

```
!bset tweakunits2 


```

```
!bset tweakunits3 


```

```
!bset tweakunits4 


```

```
!bset tweakunits5 

```

IF USING TECHCORE - 
- PLEASE USE THE BELOW ALTERNATIVE 5TH TECHCORE COMPATIBILITY TWEAK INSTEAD OF THE STANDARD 5TH TWEAK ABOVE and ADDITIONAL 6th.
- PLEASE USE THE TECHBLOCKING PASSIVE XP REMOVAL TWEAKDEF BELOW THE ALTERNATIVE 5TH and 6th TWEAKS.
- SET THE TECHBLOCKING THRESHOLDS ACCORDING TO THE INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN ON THE TECHCORE PROJECT. https://github.com/Cebolletoth/C3BOBAR/blob/main/TechCoreBAR.md

- - TECHCORE Instructions: https://discord.com/channels/549281623154229250/1447223310319489024/1467668620204310643
The faction's scavenger t3 shield building acts as the new TechCore. Unfortunately the script of the building does not allow for the creation of units so in order to achieve that at the moment you need to build the T2conturret. You can find both on the lab section of the T1constructors. Build the Shield-Core first, then the t2conturret next to it. Build the printer with the T2conturret if you want to use the t1.5 mexes available to all factions with x3 metal.

```
!bset tweakunits5 



```

```
!bset tweakunits6 

```

-----------

#PASSIVE XP Removal tweakdef
```
!bset tweakdefs Zm9yIG5hbWUsIHVuaXREZWYgaW4gcGFpcnMoVW5pdERlZnMpIGRvCiAgICB1bml0RGVmLmN1c3RvbXBhcmFtcyA9IHVuaXREZWYuY3VzdG9tcGFyYW1zIG9yIHt9CiAgICB1bml0RGVmLmN1c3RvbXBhcmFtcy50ZWNoX3BvaW50c19nYWluID0gMAplbmQ

```


------
# Balance changes

```

Pawn (armpw) weaponvelocity 600 (500), spray angle 1000 (1180)

Standard costs for same factory. Lower lab health.

T1 labs workertime 100 (150)- vehlab 150 (150)
T1 Botlabs health - 1800 (2900)
T1 Vehlabs health - 2000 (3000)
T1 Shiplabs health - 3000 (4100-4300)

Air
T1 Transports speed 170 (198 - 207) cruisealtitude 80 (100)

T2 transports lower health
Comdrop nerf
	T2 trans speed nerf
	T2 health nerf
	T2 transcost nerf
	Better aa fixed aa options 
	T2aabot buff

Legion metal extractor (legmex) - extractsmetal 0.0009 (0.008) energyupkeep -3 (-7)
Legion overcharged mex buildoption has been removed from all constructors.

Economy T2
Armada T2cons New Buildoption - Shockwave (death doesn't cause emp area)
Advanced metal extractor Armada (armmoho armuwmme) health 3800 (2800)
Fusion reactors have been restored to pre S3 patch Metalcosts and Eproduction (different from S2 - cost more E and BP and lower HP as per S3).
```
